title: limonium plurisquamatum
intro: Limonium plurisquamatum, also known as the many-hairy sea lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Limonium plurisquamatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in topical applications and supplements.
